---
title: The role of monsoon-like zonally asymmetric heating in interhemispheric transport
pagetitle: 2017-3-1-Chen2017 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2017
author: Gang Chen, Clara Orbe and Darryn Waugh
venue: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres'
venue_cit: '<i>Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres</i>, 122, 3282--3298,
  doi:10.1002/2016JD026427.'
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, Clara Orbe and Darryn Waugh, 2017: The role of monsoon-like
  zonally asymmetric heating in interhemispheric transport, <i>Journal of Geophysical
  Research: Atmospheres</i>, 122, 3282--3298, doi:10.1002/2016JD026427.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2016JD026427
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The role of monsoon-like zonally asymmetric heating in interhemispheric transport

*Published in Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 2017*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, Clara Orbe and Darryn Waugh, 2017: The role of monsoon-like zonally asymmetric heating in interhemispheric transport, <i>Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres</i>, 122, 3282--3298, doi:10.1002/2016JD026427.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2016JD026427){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
